violations.text: At the time of inspection, the back counter mini fridge was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 43 degrees Fahrenheit with ice formed on the inside of the unit blocking air flow. Per the PIC, unit is to be defrosted and checked for proper cold holding ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Ice machine is to be cleaned at a frequency to keep it clean and to preclude the buildup of residue and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
